_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: Antibodies recognizing P-Stat3-Y705 detected positive cells in all mouse GEM-neurofibromas (n=19), but not wild type mouse sciatic nerves
details: Detected positive cells in all mouse GEM-neurofibromas (n=19) but not wild type mouse sciatic nerves
